economic_notes: Nation owns Colchester Holdings Ltd. (100%) and 1560750 Alberta Ltd. / Bobtail Construction (100%), accounted for by equity method. COVID-19 declared pandemic in March 2020 with uncertain impact on operations. Treaty land entitlement negotiation ongoing.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Two wholly-owned subsidiaries (Colchester Holdings Ltd. and 1560750 Alberta Ltd./Bobtail Construction) accounted for by equity method rather than full consolidation. Prior period adjustment reclassified CMHC reserve of $700,366 from liability to equity. Large restricted cash balance of $8.11M in CIBC savings account relates to Alberta Government climate leadership solar program deferred contributions. Statement of Financial Activities shows budget deficit of $508,810 vs actual deficit of $262,837 at the program level; however the net financial assets statement shows excess of revenues over expenditures of -$106,938 due to enterprise fund and trust fund adjustments. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $8,149,094 + ASETS $1,089,098 + CMHC $99,018 + Health Canada $784151 + Alberta Government programs $410,252 = $10,531,613 (approximated as $10,532,734 using Schedule 3 ISC total of $8,036,712 plus other government lines). No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Annual debt service reflects long-term liability repayments only; capital lease payments not included separately. COVID-19 subsequent event noted.
